subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, assured leaf who supplicateth unto the Lord, thy mention hath passed through this assembly with utmost joy and delight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ورقه موقنه متضرعه الی الله ذکرت در این بساط گذشت بکمال نشاط و انبساط
subcodes.subjects: @fire and light; fire and water, @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause
